prompts.label: Install Tailwind in Vite
prompts.text:
Add Tailwind CSS to a Vite + React project step by step.

- Install packages per official guide
- tailwind.config content paths
- Import in index.css

List terminal commands.

prompts.label: Utility classes layout
prompts.text:
Build a card row using Tailwind utilities only.

- flex, gap, p-4, rounded-lg, shadow
- Three cards responsive wrap

HTML/JSX snippet.

prompts.label: Responsive md: lg:
prompts.text:
Teach responsive prefixes with a grid gallery.

- grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3
- Explain mobile-first

Minimal page example.

prompts.label: Dark mode class strategy
prompts.text:
Enable class-based dark mode in tailwind.config.

- darkMode: 'class'
- Toggle on html element with JS
- Example text and background colors

prompts.label: Buttons and hover focus
prompts.text:
Design primary and secondary buttons with Tailwind.

- hover:, focus-visible:ring, disabled:opacity-50
- Accessible contrast note

Reusable class string or @apply in component layer — explain both.

prompts.label: @apply component class
prompts.text:
When to use @apply for a .btn class vs inline utilities.

- Small example in @layer components
- Team style guide opinion

prompts.label: Forms styling
prompts.text:

prompts.label: Tailwind + Next.js

Checklist only.

prompts.label: Typography plugin prose

Short example markdown rendered as HTML block.

prompts.label: Migrate from plain CSS
prompts.text:
I have a site with custom CSS. Plan to migrate to Tailwind incrementally.

- Start with layout utilities, keep old CSS file temporarily
- 5 step strategy for beginners

No need to rewrite entire site in one PR.
